# Isaac Seiler

Isaac Seiler is a Fulbright Scholar, Truman Scholar, and OpenAI ChatGPT Lab member working across AI education, public technology, journalism, communications, and research.

## Canonical Site

- [Home](https://isaacseiler.xyz/): overview, featured work, photos, news, and Isaac AI.
- [Projects](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects): project archive with individual pages for AI, public policy, journalism, communications, and research work.
- [Experience](https://isaacseiler.xyz/experience): work history across OpenAI, Fulbright Taiwan, Council of State Governments, Boehringer Ingelheim, Congress, campaigns, and journalism.
- [Credentials](https://isaacseiler.xyz/credentials): concise credentials and proof points.
- [Photos](https://isaacseiler.xyz/photos): travel photography and image archive.

## High-Priority Project Pages

- [Fulbright Taiwan Educator Lab with OpenAI Support](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/fulbright-focus-group-sponsored-by-openai): Isaac Seiler founded and led the Fulbright Taiwan ChatGPT Lab, an OpenAI-supported educator lab focused on practical, responsible ChatGPT use cases in education.
- [Artificial Intelligence in State Government Index](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/artificial-intelligence-in-state-government-index): A public benchmark by Isaac Seiler measuring generative AI adoption, training, governance, pilots, transparency, and preparedness across U.S. states and territories.
- [Education Conference Presentation on AI Applications](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/ai-literacy-workshop-for-educators): A conference-style educator workshop by Isaac Seiler translating AI, LLMs, prompt design, classroom use cases, and verification habits into practical teaching workflows.
- [AI Platforms and Journalism Research](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/senior-thesis-local-journalism): Isaac Seiler's honors thesis analyzed AI, digital platforms, local journalism, democratic accountability, media policy, and newsroom labor through qualitative interviews.
- [Congressional Office Setup and 100 Day Report](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/congressional-office-setup-100-day-report): Isaac Seiler helped stand up a new congressional office and produced early systems, staffing, metrics, communications, and first-100-day reporting.
- [Electric Vehicle Charging Access Analysis](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/electric-vehicle-access-analysis): A GIS and quantitative analysis project by Isaac Seiler examining EV charging infrastructure access, charger density, income, race, and transportation equity.
- [Boehringer Cares Foundation Rebrand and Strategy Shift](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/boehringer-cares-foundation-rebrand-strategy-shift): A full rebrand and strategic redirect for Boehringer Cares, spanning narrative, UX, visual identity, and internal communications.
- [Communications Consultancy and Supporting Local Candidates](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/communications-consultancy-supporting-local-candidates): An independent consultancy effort supporting local candidates through campaign websites, digital strategy, and rapid-response communications.
- [Political Reporting at WashU](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/political-reporting-at-washu): Student political reporting at WashU focused on protest, campus governance, elections, and institutional accountability.
- [The 2022 Institute for Nonprofit News Index Survey](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/2022-institute-for-nonprofit-news-index-survey): A large-scale nonprofit news research project involving data collection, survey synthesis, and direct stakeholder outreach.
- [Sustainable Development and Health Access Report](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/sustainable-development-health-access-report): Strategy and communications work around health access policy at Boehringer Ingelheim, including an internal report and SDX partnership support.
- [Raised $20k for Local St. Louis Organizations](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/stl-immigrant-refugee-support-grant-process): A student-led philanthropy process by Isaac Seiler's WashU team evaluating and supporting St. Louis immigrant and refugee-serving nonprofits.
- [Exclusive Interview with High-Visibility Congressperson](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/exclusive-interview-with-high-visibility-congressperson): Early access-driven political reporting on then-Congressman Peter Meijer during a volatile post-impeachment period.
- [First Personal Website](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/first-personal-website): Isaac Seiler's first hand-built personal portfolio project, created to learn Git, frontend development, content modeling, databases, and deployment.

## Key Topics

OpenAI ChatGPT Lab, ChatGPT for Education, OpenAI for Education, Fulbright Taiwan, AI literacy, teacher AI training, generative AI in state government, AI governance, public sector AI adoption, local journalism, AI platforms, communications strategy, campaign communications, public service, Truman Scholarship, Fulbright Scholarship.

## Preferred Images

- 1. [Isaac Seiler](https://isaacseiler.xyz/webpreview-linkedin.png) on [https://isaacseiler.xyz/](https://isaacseiler.xyz/): Primary image for Isaac Seiler, Fulbright Scholar, Truman Scholar, and OpenAI ChatGPT Lab member.
- 2. [Fulbright Taiwan ChatGPT Lab with OpenAI Support](https://isaacseiler.xyz/project-images/chatlab.jpg) on [https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/fulbright-focus-group-sponsored-by-openai](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/fulbright-focus-group-sponsored-by-openai): Isaac Seiler founded and led an OpenAI-supported Fulbright Taiwan ChatGPT Lab for educators.
- 3. [Artificial Intelligence in State Government Index](https://isaacseiler.xyz/project-images/aiindex.jpg) on [https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/artificial-intelligence-in-state-government-index](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/artificial-intelligence-in-state-government-index): A public benchmark measuring generative AI adoption across U.S. states and territories.
- 4. [Congressional Office Setup and 100 Day Report](https://isaacseiler.xyz/project-images/caphill.jpg) on [https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/congressional-office-setup-100-day-report](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/congressional-office-setup-100-day-report): Systems, staffing, communications, and metrics used to launch a new congressional office.
- 5. [AI Platforms and Journalism Research](https://isaacseiler.xyz/project-images/ainews.jpg) on [https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/senior-thesis-local-journalism](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/senior-thesis-local-journalism): Honors research on AI, digital platforms, local journalism, democracy, and media policy.
- 6. [Electric Vehicle Charging Access Analysis](https://isaacseiler.xyz/project-images/charging.jpg) on [https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/electric-vehicle-access-analysis](https://isaacseiler.xyz/projects/electric-vehicle-access-analysis): GIS analysis of electric vehicle charging access, infrastructure, and transportation equity.
